page.disabled_title: Channels are off for this workspace
page.disabled_description: A workspace admin can turn on Channels from Settings. Once enabled, you'll be able to chat with teammates and agents in dedicated channels alongside the issue board.
page.welcome_description: Pick a channel from the left, or create a new one with the + button.

header.archive_confirm_description: The channel will disappear from the list and from search. Historical messages and memberships are preserved — nothing is deleted. An admin can reverse this from the database (no restore UI yet).

create_dialog.title: Create channel
create_dialog.description: Channels are where teammates and agents talk. Public channels are visible to everyone in the workspace; private channels are invitation-only.
create_dialog.public_hint: Anyone in the workspace can find and join.
create_dialog.private_hint: Only invited members can see this channel.

settings_dialog.title: Channel settings
settings_dialog.description_dm: DM settings are limited — DM membership is fixed at creation.
settings_dialog.description_channel: Edit display name, description, and retention. Channel admins only.
settings_dialog.retention_invalid: Retention must be an integer between 1 and 3650 days.

new_dm_dialog.title: New direct message
new_dm_dialog.description: Pick a teammate or an agent to start a 1:1 conversation. If a DM with this person already exists, you'll jump back to it.

members_panel.title: Members
members_panel.description_dm: Direct message participants. To talk to someone else, start a new DM.
members_panel.description_channel: Workspace members and agents in this channel.
members_panel.everyone_added: Everyone is already in this channel.

messages.empty: No messages yet. Be the first to say hello.
messages.delete_confirm_description: The message will be replaced with a "[message deleted]" placeholder. Replies under it will still be visible.

thread_to_issue_dialog.title: Convert thread to issue task
thread_to_issue_dialog.description: Dispatch an agent to create issue(s) from this thread. The agent runs in issue-task mode and may call multica issue create / update / comment.
thread_to_issue_dialog.no_agents: No agents available in this workspace.
thread_to_issue_dialog.instruction_placeholder: What should the agent capture? Defaults to the agent's judgment.
